title: Rock with You
album: HIStory - PAST, PRESENT AND FUTURE - BOOK I
why_this_song: Rock with You by Michael Jackson (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "I wanna rock with you (all night)"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "I wanna rock with you (all night)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Dance you into day (sunlight)"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Lay back and groove with mine"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You got to feel that heat"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rock" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rock" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: Let that rhythm get into you
And we're gonna ride the boogie

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Rock with You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Rock with You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Rock with You", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Rock with You", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Rock with You" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Rock with You" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
